aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment: Configure how the accordion should be rendered

values.name: config
values.comment: Simple config from msg, title and rendering function
values.type: (Daisy.Accordion.State -> msg) -> (data -> String.String) -> (data -> Html.Html msg) -> Daisy.Accordion.Config data msg

name: Daisy.Actions

values.name: alignTo
values.comment: Attribute that defines the aligment of dropdown
values.type: Daisy.Actions.Dropdown -> Html.Attribute msg

values.name: btn
values.comment: A simple button
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: closeModal
values.comment: A button that lives in the modal used to close it.
values.type: String.String -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: dropdown
values.comment:
The outer layer of a dropdown. It defines the label used to toggle it.

Content can be created by the auxiliary functions dropdownMenu, dropdownCard, dropdownData

    dropdown [ alignTo End ]
        [ dropdownButton [ color primary ] [ text "open" ]
        , dropdownMenu [] [ text "Item 1", text "Item 2" ]
        ]
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: dropdownButton
values.comment: Button that triggers the dropdown
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: dropdownCard
values.comment: Contents for a dropdown card
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: dropdownData
values.comment: Contents for arbitrary dropdown content
values.type: Types.Element msg -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: dropdownMenu
values.comment: Contents for a dropdown menu
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: modal
values.comment: Content of your modal dialog. It should be placed at the end of the HTML document
values.type: String.String -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: openModal
values.comment: A button that lives in your main document used to open the modal
values.type: String.String -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: swap
values.comment: Swap allows you to toggle the visibility of two elements.
values.type: (Basics.Bool -> msg) -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: swapActive
values.comment: Attribute to turn the swap on by default
values.type: Html.Attribute msg

values.name: swapFlip
values.comment: Adds flip effect to swap
values.type: Html.Attribute msg

values.name: swapRotate
values.comment: Adds rotate effect to swap
values.type: Html.Attribute msg

name: Daisy.Breadcrumbs

aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment: Store information on how to render a breadcrumb
aliases.type: { home : Maybe.Maybe url, icon : Svg.Svg msg, element : Types.Element msg, link : url -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg), empty : url -> Basics.Bool }

values.name: config
values.comment:
Simple config for breadcrumb view

    config [ home "/home/", icon I.folder ]
values.type: List.List (Daisy.Breadcrumbs.Config Types.Url msg -> Daisy.Breadcrumbs.Config Types.Url msg) -> Daisy.Breadcrumbs.Config Types.Url msg

values.name: configCustom
values.comment: Custom config for breadcrumbs view
values.type: List.List (Daisy.Breadcrumbs.Config url msg -> Daisy.Breadcrumbs.Config url msg) -> Daisy.Breadcrumbs.Config url msg

values.name: empty
values.comment: Function that determines if links are valid or not
values.type: (url -> Basics.Bool) -> Daisy.Breadcrumbs.Config url msg -> Daisy.Breadcrumbs.Config url msg

values.name: home
values.comment: Define the home URL
values.type: url -> Daisy.Breadcrumbs.Config url msg -> Daisy.Breadcrumbs.Config url msg

values.name: icon
values.comment: Set the home icon
values.type: (Basics.Int -> Material.Icons.Types.Coloring -> Svg.Svg msg) -> Daisy.Breadcrumbs.Config url msg -> Daisy.Breadcrumbs.Config url msg

values.name: link
values.comment: Control which attributes are added to valid links
values.type: (url -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg)) -> Daisy.Breadcrumbs.Config url msg -> Daisy.Breadcrumbs.Config url msg

values.name: noHome
values.comment: Disable the home url
values.type: Daisy.Breadcrumbs.Config url msg -> Daisy.Breadcrumbs.Config url msg

values.name: unlinkLast
values.comment:
Transform the last pair (url, name) to ("", name), disabling its
hyperlink.
values.type: List.List ( Types.Url, Types.Name ) -> List.List ( Types.Url, Types.Name )

values.name: view
values.comment: Render breadcrubms
values.type: Daisy.Breadcrumbs.Config url msg -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List ( url, Types.Name ) -> Html.Html msg

name: Daisy.Display
comment:
Data display elements. This module contains only the simple stateless elements.

Carosel is in its own module.

values.name: alert
values.comment: Warn the user with some alert message
values.type: Maybe.Maybe Daisy.Warn.Warn -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: avatar
values.comment:
Create an avatar from image or placeholder text, if image is absent.

The result data can be either `Ok url`, with the url pointing to the avatar image or
a `Err placeholder` with the placeholder text.
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Result.Result String.String String.String -> Html.Html msg

name: Daisy.Elements

values.name: container
values.comment: Main container element for page content.
values.type: List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: counter
values.comment:
A simple rounded counter

    counter [ class "foo" ] 10

It displays the number n within a circle
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> Basics.Int -> Html.Html msg

values.name: link
values.comment:
Safely creates a link

External urls append a `target:blank_` that forces the navigator to open then
in a different tab.
values.type: Types.Url -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg)

values.name: list
values.comment:
Render a list of a's as an <ul> element.

It uses the first argument to convert a's to Html's.

    list text [] [ "foo", "bar", "baz" ]
values.type: (a -> Html.Html msg) -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List a -> Html.Html msg

values.name: longPlaceholderText
values.comment: A string that can be used as a placeholder for unloaded data
values.type: String.String

values.name: loremText
values.comment: A string that can be used as a placeholder for unloaded data
values.type: String.String

values.name: sections
values.comment: Create a description list from a list of titles and their corresponding Html content.
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List ( String.String, List.List (Html.Html msg) ) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: shortPlaceholderText
values.comment: A string that can be used as a placeholder for unloaded data
values.type: String.String

values.name: tags
values.comment: Renders a list of strings as tags
values.type: List.List String.String -> Html.Html msg

values.name: title
values.comment: Main title of page
values.type: String.String -> Html.Html msg

values.name: urlList
values.comment:
Render a list of (url, name) pairs as an <ul> element.

If the list is empty, it produces a `div [] [ text fallback ]`
values.type: List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> ( String.String, List.List ( Types.Url, String.String ) ) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: link
values.comment:
Style an element as a link

    a [ href "/", link Primary ] [ text "Home" ]
values.type: Daisy.Role.Role -> Html.Attribute msg

values.name: linkHover
values.comment:
Show link style only on hover

    a [ href "/", linkHover ] [ text "Home" ]
values.type: Html.Attribute msg

values.name: pagination
values.comment:
A simple numeric pagination from a triplet with of (min, selected, maximum) integers
and a function that computes an action from the numeric value associated with the button.

    pagination ( 1, 3, 5 ) action

will display the list of numbers `[1, 2, *3*, 4, 5]`

Action is a function that takes the display number and computes an attribute, usually it
will be something like

    action i =
        onClick (OnPaginateTo (i - 1))
values.type: ( Basics.Int, Basics.Int, Basics.Int ) -> (Basics.Int -> Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: steps
values.comment:
Show an horizontal list of steps

    -- a step function specialized in rendering strings
    stepTexts = steps text Primary

    stepTexts []
        [ "completed 1", "completed  2" ]
        [ "missing 1", "missing 2" ]
values.type: (a -> Html.Html msg) -> Daisy.Role.Role -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List a -> List.List a -> Html.Html msg

name: Daisy.Role

unions.name: Role

values.name: name
values.comment: Convert role to string
values.type: Daisy.Role.Role -> String.String

values.name: withRole
values.comment: Create a role class from prefix
values.type: String.String -> Daisy.Role.Role -> Html.Attribute msg

name: Daisy.Tab

aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment: Declare how tabs are rendered and integrated to the rest of the application
aliases.type: { msg : Daisy.Tab.Msg -> msg, tabs : List.List ( String.String, a -> Html.Html msg ) }

values.name: config
values.comment:
Create a config object.

It is necessary to pass the message wrapper in your module and a list
of pairs with (title, render) with the name of the tab and the render
function for the corresponding tab.
values.type: (Daisy.Tab.Msg -> msg) -> List.List ( String.String, a -> Html.Html msg ) -> Daisy.Tab.Config a msg

values.name: index
values.comment: Return the index of the currently selected tab.
values.type: Daisy.Tab.Model -> Basics.Int

values.name: init
values.comment:
Initial tab state.

Store this in your model.
values.type: Daisy.Tab.Config a msg -> Daisy.Tab.Model

values.name: setIndex
values.comment: Force selected tab to the given index
values.type: Basics.Int -> Daisy.Tab.Model -> Daisy.Tab.Model

values.name: title
values.comment: Return the tab title from the currently selected tab.
values.type: Daisy.Tab.Config a msg -> Daisy.Tab.Model -> String.String

values.name: update
values.comment: Update function
values.type: Daisy.Tab.Msg -> Daisy.Tab.Model -> Daisy.Tab.Model

values.name: view
values.comment: Render tabs from config and tab state
values.type: Daisy.Tab.Config a msg -> Daisy.Tab.Model -> a -> Html.Html msg

values.name: icon
values.comment: Create a warn icon

values.name: name
values.comment: Convert warning to string
values.type: Daisy.Warn.Warn -> String.String
